evidence: "A woman coming into her own story...very powerful and funny at the same time!"
"Great movie. Very touching and you hate and love the characters though the whole movie...also funny!"
"Meh, it was ok. It wasn't Gone Girl...but I could relate to the character because she was having to get something going at such a late stage in life."
"Watching this made me have to smile...more money doesn't make you any happier."
"Really good. Sad but close to reality."
"Beautiful. Really an interesting way of life back in those days...extremely interesting to watch and beautifully shot."
"Beautiful film...extremely interesting to watch and beautifully shot."
"Good movie! Not sure how true to life it is but I watch it all the time."
"Doesn't hurt that Joaquin is so dreamy either."
"Woody never disappoints with his whole neuroticism playing out."
"Very inspiring and Woody never disappoints with his whole neuroticism playing out."
"Beautiful. Really an interesting way of life back in those days..."
"I fell in love with Annie...she reminds me so much of myself, she grows throughout the whole movie into her own woman."
"Great movie. Very touching and you hate and love the characters though the whole movie...also funny!"

summary: The user enjoys drama and comedy films that are character-driven and emotionally resonant. They appreciate high production quality and prefer slower-paced narratives that evoke deep feelings and personal connections.
